Thursday 17 July 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee 

Briefing on meetings with representative counterparts and government officials 

Hearing of evidence:

French Senate Delegation 

Senator Philippe Folliot 
Senator Sebastian Pla
